spring-boot-actuator/src/main/java/com/a.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence package.
spring-boot-actuator/src/main/java/com/a.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3.x), causing compile errors for missing classes.

spring-boot-admin-server/src/main/java/c.general_idea: Remove dependency on the deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter class which was removed in Spring Security 6.
spring-boot-admin-server/src/main/java/c.why_exists: WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter class does not exist in Spring Security 6+, causing a compilation error.

spring-boot-admin-server/src/main/java/c.general_idea: Replace the overridden configure(HttpSecurity) method with a SecurityFilterChain bean definition.
spring-boot-admin-server/src/main/java/c.why_exists: The configure(HttpSecurity) method is no longer part of the configuration mechanism in Spring Security 6; using it results in a compilation error or ignored configuration.
spring-boot-admin-server/src/main/java/c.before:
@Override
protected void configure(HttpSecurity http) throws Exception
spring-boot-admin-server/src/main/java/c.after:
@Bean
protected SecurityFilterChain filterChain(HttpSecurity http) throws Exception

spring-boot-admin-server/src/main/java/c.general_idea: Update authorization configuration to use the new lambda-based DSL and requestMatchers.
spring-boot-admin-server/src/main/java/c.why_exists: authorizeRequests() and antMatchers() are removed in Spring Security 6; using them causes compilation errors.

spring-boot-admin-server/src/main/java/c.general_idea: Update form login configuration to use the new lambda-based DSL.
spring-boot-admin-server/src/main/java/c.why_exists: The old fluent API for formLogin() is removed in Spring Security 6; using it causes compilation errors.

spring-boot-admin-server/src/main/java/c.general_idea: Update logout configuration to use the new lambda-based DSL.
spring-boot-admin-server/src/main/java/c.why_exists: The old fluent API for logout() is removed in Spring Security 6; using it causes compilation errors.

spring-boot-admin-server/src/main/java/c.general_idea: Update HTTP Basic configuration to use the new lambda-based DSL with Customizer.
spring-boot-admin-server/src/main/java/c.why_exists: The old fluent API for httpBasic() is removed in Spring Security 6; using it causes compilation errors.

spring-boot-admin-server/src/main/java/c.general_idea: Update CSRF configuration to use the new lambda-based DSL and ignoringRequestMatchers.
spring-boot-admin-server/src/main/java/c.why_exists: The old fluent API for csrf() and ignoringAntMatchers() are removed in Spring Security 6; using them causes compilation errors.

spring-boot-admin-server/src/main/java/c.general_idea: Add return statement to build and return the SecurityFilterChain.
spring-boot-admin-server/src/main/java/c.why_exists: The new SecurityFilterChain bean method must return a SecurityFilterChain object; omitting it causes a compilation error.
